_doc: Domain pack for go-stablenet — the reference instance of the domain-pack contract (ADR docs/domain-pack-contract-adr-2026-06-22.md). Phase 2a wires identity + invariants + context_classifier into the agents. Phase 2b (this) promotes the former `_phase2` block to the live `verification` contract: the Evaluator sources repo root + build/test commands from here. The stage LOOP (verification.stages) is data-driven in Phase 2b-β. Resolved at runtime via the generic `domain-pack` loader skill keyed by state.project_id.

knowledge._note: domain knowledge lives in this project's cks index (guidance.* / policy/stablenet.yaml / domain entries); the pack carries only the search-independent backstop + path classifier

verification._doc: Build/test contract the Evaluator consumes (Phase 2b). Commands are run in repo_root; templates use {pkgs}/{cover_out} placeholders the Evaluator fills. `stages` drives the §3 loop (kind: builtin:* | mcp:*) — data-driven dispatch lands in Phase 2b-β. NOTE: a stage's MCP tool (e.g. chainbench) must still be granted in the Evaluator frontmatter — MCP grants are static (not pack-driven).

build._doc: binary_cmd builds the node binary the chain runs (via the project Makefile), at `artifact`. cmd is a compile-all sanity gate only.

unit_test._scope_doc: focused_tmpl is the per-bug-cycle default (Evaluator §4.2): it runs ONLY the test functions the fix itself added/changed (go test -run, fast — NOT whole changed-package suites, which can run tens of minutes for heavy trees like miner/core). For an e2e-tier bug the acceptance oracle is the chainbench repro (§7.5c), not a unit suite; for a simulation-tier bug the reproduction unit test is among the fix's own tests. affected_tmpl runs ONCE as the final regression gate (Evaluator §8.0) over the change's AFFECTED CLOSURE — changed packages plus their reverse-dependency importers — only when every other gate is green. targeted_tmpl (whole changed packages) is available but is NOT the per-cycle default; full (whole-repo ./...) is manual only (a ./... run wastes time on packages the fix cannot affect, e.g. a pre-existing accounts/abi/bind 600s timeout, core ~7min).

stages._run_when_doc: Evaluator skips this stage when the diff has no non-test .go change (docs/test/tooling-only) — the node binary behavior is unchanged, so integration e2e is not informative. Override is forced when an e2e reproduction oracle needs a running chain. Omit run_when to always run.
